Real Bottle Sizes
Bottle Size Guide

Pick the size that fits your routine.

Use the real bottle photo as a quick guide before ordering. Small is perfect for testing a scent, medium is great for daily use, large gives a more premium bottle feel, and extra large is best for your signature fragrance.

Small$8Great for trying a new scent.
Medium$15Easy everyday carry size.
Large$23Premium bottle option.
Extra Large$30Best for signature scents.

The Collection

Search by fragrance name, designer inspiration, or scent note. Tap a bottle size price to add that exact size to your cart, or press Reserve to start with a small bottle.

How to Order

Build your cart, then DM.

Ordering is simple: pick the scent, choose the size, review the total with tax, and send your cart message to @abdulattars.

1

Choose your scent

Search by name, inspiration, or scent note. Best sellers are highlighted near the top.

2

Pick bottle size

Tap S, M, L, or XL on each product card to add the exact size to your cart.

3

Review your cart

Adjust quantity or size. The cart shows subtotal, 9% sales tax, and estimated total.

4

DM to confirm

Press the DM button, copy your order message, and send it to @abdulattars.
